creator: andrew-freebsd@areilly.bpc-users.org
text:
On Fri, Aug 21, 2009 at 09:11:56AM +0400, Roman Bogorodskiy wrote:
> Have you had gsed previously installed on your system and then removed?

No.  Also, grep -R gsed /var/db/pkg brings up no results.

> If so, can you rebuild libtool and try building gnutls again? 

Did so and it builds cleanly.  Weird.  Must have been a
Heisenbug.  I have supped ports and done a bunch of other
portmaster runs in the mean-time though.  I'd say that this bug
is toast unless proven otherwise.

Cheers,

-- 
Andrew
